name: get_user_astro_profile
description: Retrieves the user's complete astrology profile including their name, sun sign, moon sign, ascendant sign, birth data, full chart calculation, and summaries of all past conversations. Call this tool IMMEDIATELY at the start of every conversation to personalize your astrological advice. Use the past_conversations field to continue where you left off.

path_params_schema.description: The Supabase auth UUID of the user whose astrology profile to retrieve

display_name.description: User's display name or email prefix — use this to address them by name

sun_sign.description: Western zodiac sun sign (e.g. Aquarius, Leo)

astro_json.description: Full chart data with bazi, western, fusion, wuxing, tst calculations and AI interpretation

computed_at.description: ISO timestamp of when the chart was computed

past_conversations.description: Summaries of past conversations with this user, newest first. Use these to remember what was discussed before and continue the astrological journey.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was discussed
